mapper.sql: select distinct zcv.id,zcv.course_id,zcv.binding,zcv.video_path,zcv.title,zcv.subtitle,zcv.content,zcv.remark,zcv.duration,zcv.adjunct_url,zcv.is_pay,zcv.amount,zcv.status,zcv.sort,zcv.creator,zcv.created_at,zcv.updator,zcv.updated_at, zcv.lecturer, zcv.label, zcv.agent_ids, zcv.audit_status, zcv.stage
mapper.select:
,(select uvl.id from zhs_user_video_log uvl where zcv.id = uvl.video_id and type = 1 and uvl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} and uvl.platform_id = #{platform}) endorse
,(select uvl.id from zhs_user_video_log uvl where zcv.id = uvl.video_id and type = 2 and uvl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} and uvl.platform_id = #{platform}) favorite
,u.nickname, u.avatar
left join zhs_center_project.users u on u.uuid = zcv.creator where zcv.id = #{id}

,(select uvl.id from zhs_user_video_log uvl where zcv.id = uvl.video_id and type = 1 and uvl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} and uvl.platform_id = #{platform}) endorse
,(select uvl.id from zhs_user_video_log uvl where zcv.id = uvl.video_id and type = 2 and uvl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} and uvl.platform_id = #{platform}) favorite
,u.nickname, u.avatar
left join zhs_user_video_log uvl on uvl.video_id = zcv.id left join zhs_center_project.users u on u.uuid = zcv.creator
and uvl.platform_id = (select ep.`id` from zhs_education_platform ep where ep.`code` = #{platformId}) and uvl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} and uvl.`type` = #{type}
select MAX(sort) from zhs_course_video where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert:
insert into zhs_course_video
id, stage, course_id, binding, video_path, title, subtitle, content, remark, duration, adjunct_url, is_pay, amount, `status`, sort, creator, created_at, updator, updated_at, lecturer, label, agent_ids,
#{id}, #{stage}, #{courseId}, #{binding}, #{videoPath}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{content}, #{remark}, #{duration}, #{adjunctUrl}, #{isPay}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{creator}, #{createdAt}, #{updator}, #{updatedAt}, #{lecturer}, #{label}, #{agentIds},

insert into zhs_course_video (course_id, binding, video_path, title, subtitle, content, remark, duration, adjunct_url, is_pay, amount, status, creator, lecturer,label,agent_ids, stage)
(#{item.courseId}, #{item.binding}, #{item.viderPath}, #{item.title}, #{item.subtitle}, #{item.content}, #{item.remark}, #{item.duration}, #{item.adjunctUrl}, #{item.isPay}, #{item.amount}, #{item.status}, #{item.creator}, #{item.lecturer}, #{item.label}, #{item.agentIds}, #{item.stage})

insert into zhs_course_video
id, stage, videoId, course_id, binding, video_path, title, subtitle, content, remark, duration, adjunct_url, is_pay, amount, `status`, sort, creator, created_at, updator, updated_at, lecturer, label, agent_ids,
#{id}, #{stage}, #{videoId}, #{courseId}, #{binding}, #{videoPath}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{content}, #{remark}, #{duration}, #{adjunctUrl}, #{isPay}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{creator}, #{createdAt}, #{updator}, #{updatedAt}, #{lecturer}, #{label}, #{agentIds},
course_id = VALUES(course_id), stage = VALUES(stage), binding = VALUES(binding), video_path = VALUES(video_path), title = VALUES(title), subtitle = VALUES(subtitle), content = VALUES(content), remark = VALUES(remark), duration = VALUES(duration), adjunct_url = VALUES(adjunct_url), is_pay = VALUES(is_pay), amount = VALUES(amount), `status`= VALUES(`status`), sort = VALUES(sort), creator = VALUES(creator), created_at = VALUES(created_at), updator = VALUES(updator), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), lecturer = VALUES(lecturer), label = VALUES(label), agent_ids = VALUES(agent_ids),
mapper.delete:
delete from zhs_course_video where agent_id in
#{agentId}
mapper.update:
update zhs_course_video set audit_status = 1 where creator = #{uuid} and id in
#{id}
